message:
refactor(pthread): track host thread TIDs via start trampoline

Add HOST_THREAD_TID_REGISTRY to record kernel TIDs of threads created
through host pthread_create. The new host_pthread_start_trampoline
wrapper captures TID at thread start, enabling resolve_thread_tid to
find TIDs for host threads.

This eliminates host delegations for:
- pthread_kill → native tgkill
- pthread_sigqueue → native rt_tgsigqueueinfo
- pthread_setname_np → native /proc write
- pthread_getname_np → native /proc read
- pthread_getaffinity_np → native sched_getaffinity
- pthread_setaffinity_np → native sched_setaffinity
- pthread_getcpuclockid → native clock_getres
- pthread_gettid_np → registry lookup

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
